name: FrootAI
description: The open glue for AI Architecture — 20 solution plays, 18 knowledge modules, 16 MCP tools, DevKit (.github Agentic OS) + TuneKit (AI fine-tuning). From the Roots to the Fruits.
features: 20 pre-packaged AI solution plays (RAG, agents, landing zones, observability)
DevKit: .github Agentic OS with 7 primitives (19 files per play)
TuneKit: Pre-tuned AI config (temperature, guardrails, agents, model comparison)
16-tool MCP server (6 static + 4 live + 3 agent chain + 3 AI ecosystem)
VS Code extension: standalone engine with bundled knowledge, 13 commands
18 FROOT knowledge modules covering AI architecture end-to-end
